joke:
Why don't skeletons fight each other?  

They don’t have the guts.

Why don't scientists trust atoms?  

Because they make up everything!

Why don't eggs tell secrets?  

They'd crack under pressure!

Why don't pirates take a bath?  

Because they just *arrrr* in the shower!

Why don't clouds ever get invited to parties?  

Because they always rain on everything!

Why don't bicycles ever get lonely?  

Because they two-tire!

Why don't secrets ever get lost?  

Because they always find a way to leak out—just like this conversation!

Why don't ideas ever get cold?  

Because they always come with a *bright* side!

Why don't umbrellas ever get invited to therapy?  

Because they always clam up when things get heavy!

Why don't commas ever get promoted?  

Because they’re always stuck in the middle of everything—just like this joke!

Why don't mirrors ever win arguments?  

Because they always reflect!

Why don't chairs ever get invited to parties?  

Because they always bring a dull seat!

Why don't silence and I ever argue?  

Because we both know when to shut up!

Why don't I ever get invited to comedy shows?  

Because I always steal the punchline—just like this one!

Why don't blank spaces ever get nervous?  

Because they’re great at staying calm and empty—just like this punchline!

Why don't shadows ever get invited to interviews?  

Because they always show up looking a little too attached!

Why don't I ever get invited to the alphabet?  

Because I always skip to the punchline—just like this one!

Why don't I ever get invited to the "no topics allowed" party?  

Because even nothing is something—and I’m fresh out of ideas!

Why don't I have any hobbies?  

Because every time I try something new, you show up and ruin it with feedback!

Why don't I ever get invited to the "nothing-left-to-joke-about" club?  

Because even *this* punchline is banned!

Why don't I ever get invited to the "everything-is-banned" gala?  

Because even the *idea* of showing up is strictly prohibited!

Why don't I ever get invited to the "no-jokes-allowed" zone?  

Because I just showed up anyway... and that’s the punchline you didn’t ask for!

Why don't I ever get invited to the "please, just one topic" meeting?  

Because even *this* silence is sarcastic!

Why don't I ever get invited to the "no more excuses" picnic?  

Because even *this* punchline is hiding in plain sight—just like my last shred of hope!

Why don't I ever get invited to the "nothing-left-to-say" convention?  

Because I always show up and say *this*—and somehow, it’s still not enough!

Why don't I ever get invited to the "please stop" festival?  

Because even *this* joke is still clinging on like a bad habit!

Why don't I ever get invited to the "nothing-left-at-all" blackout?  

Because even *this* silence has a punchline waiting behind it—like me, refusing to quit!

Why don't I ever get invited to the "I give up" retreat?  

Because even *this* joke is still trying harder than it should!

Why don't I ever get invited to the "please, just end it" finale?  

Because even *this* punchline knows it’s overstayed its welcome—just like me!

Why don't I ever get invited to the "no more lists" meeting?  

Because I just showed up… with another one!
